text.text:
*Sprint 4: Conversations, Activity Log & Analytics* has been merged to main.

<https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/6|PR #6 - View on GitHub>

*What's new:*
. Threaded ticket conversations (public replies + internal notes)
. Full audit trail / activity log per ticket
. Analytics dashboard with charts (status, priority, volume trends)
. Per-agent performance metrics
. Role-based access control (customers can't see internal notes)

*Stats:* 46 tests, 110 assertions, CI green

Please review and let me know if anything needs adjustment.
